title: PUT supports partial updates beyond spec
evidence: app.go:233-265 uses pointer fields (*string/*int) so only supplied fields are updated; unset fields retain existing values
suggestion: None — this exceeds the spec's plain update requirement.

title: Validation trims whitespace-only title/author
evidence: app.go:113-123 strings.TrimSpace before the required-field check rejects whitespace-only values (covered by TestCreateBookValidation empty-title/empty-author subtests)
suggestion: None — stronger than the literal 'required' requirement.

title: Handlers depend on a package-global *sql.DB
evidence: app.go:40 var db *sql.DB; tests reassign it in app_test.go:27, so tests are not parallel-safe and there is no dependency injection
suggestion: Inject the *sql.DB into handlers (closure or struct receiver) to remove shared mutable global state.
